results.rendered_html:
su—ṣumṇa or su—ṣumna, mf(ā)n. very gracious or kind,  RV. ;  VS. ;
m. N. of one of the 7 principal rays of the sun (supposed to supply heat to the moon),  VP. ;
(ā), f. a partic. artery (prob. ‘the carotid’) or vein of the body (lying between those called iḍā and piṅgalā, and supposed to be one of the passages for the breath or spirit; cf. brahma-randhra),  Up. ;  BhP. ;  Rājat.
